diagrams.title: 8051 Register Organization
diagrams.description: Shows 8051 register banks, SFRs, and internal RAM organization
diagrams.purpose: Understanding register allocation in 8051 context and memory-mapped register access

diagrams.title: Live Variable Intervals
diagrams.description: Timeline showing variable lifetimes and register allocation opportunities
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how live variable analysis enables register reuse across non-overlapping lifetimes

diagrams.title: Interference Graph Example
diagrams.description: Graph representation showing which variables cannot share registers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding graph coloring approach to register allocation problem
